auth.tagline: Track sales. Pay commissions. Stay in sync.
auth.taglineSub: The Cluster Systems portal for sales, commissions and payouts — one source of truth for the whole team.
auth.mfaSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSentSubtitle: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way.
auth.agreePrefix: By signing in, you agree to our

signup.title: Access is by invitation
signup.body: Sales Hub accounts are created by invitation. If you work with Cluster Systems, ask your administrator or account manager to send you an invitation — you'll receive an email to activate your account.

invite.invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used.
invite.expired: This invitation has expired — ask your administrator to send a new one.
invite.title: Activate your account
invite.subtitle: Choose a password for
invite.pwTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
invite.mfaSubtitle: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password…), then enter the 6-digit code.
invite.manualKey: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Your two-step verification stays unchanged.
reset.doneSubtitle: You can now log in with your new password.

assistant.title: Cleo
assistant.subtitle: Your Sales Hub guide — ask me anything
assistant.greeting: Hi, I'm Cleo 👋 your Sales Hub guide. Ask me how commissions are calculated, where to find something, or how a feature works — or take a quick guided tour.
suggestions: Where do I see my monthly points?
How do teams and quotas work?
assistant.notConfigured: The assistant isn't configured yet — ask your administrator.
assistant.rateLimited: Too many messages — please wait a few minutes.
assistant.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
assistant.disclaimer: AI assistant — may make mistakes. It can't see your data.

reseller.title: Resellers
reseller.subtitle: POS license activations (Zoho) and residual payments (Zentact).

filters.noResultsDesc: Try a different year, month, reseller, or search term.

reseller.notConnectedDesc: {{source}} integration is coming in the next phase.

activations.emptyDesc: Once the Zoho Form webhook is configured, license-order submissions will appear here.

payments.emptyDesc: Set a reseller's Zentact key in Admin → Manage Resellers to see the merchants they activated.

revenue.title: Processing Revenue
revenue.subtitle: Merchant Transaction Profit from Zentact — basis for salesperson bonuses and reseller residuals.

filters.noResultsDesc: Try a different year, month, or search term.

revenue.emptyDesc: The Zentact revenue import is still running or not connected — check back shortly.

adminDataTools.title: Invoice Enrichment & Recalculation
adminDataTools.desc: New tools to enrich invoices (classify hardware vs SaaS) and recalculate commissions with the subscription model.

connectionBanner.title: Zoho {{service}} connection lost
connectionBanner.subtitle: {{service}} sync is paused until you reconnect.

probation.tooltip: New-hire probation (first 3 months) — quota not enforced; commission paid regardless of points.

tour.welcomeBody: Let me give you a quick 30-second tour of Sales Hub. You can skip anytime.
tour.menuBody: The left menu stays collapsed to keep things tidy. Click here to expand or collapse it — hover any icon to see its name.
tour.dashBody: Your home base — your commission this month, quota progress, bonuses and top customers at a glance.
tour.trackerBody: Track points and quota progress — deals and payment activations that count toward your bonuses.
tour.reportBody: Your detailed monthly commissions, what's unlocked vs pending, and your pay stubs.
tour.resellerBody: Track POS activations attributed to external resellers.
tour.revenueBody: Monthly payment-processing revenue per rep and reseller.
tour.resourcesBody: Your shared sales documents — search, browse and download guides and templates.
tour.profileBody: Your account settings, language and preferences.
tour.cleoBody: Click me anytime for help, or to take this tour again. Enjoy Sales Hub!
tour.askError: Sorry, something went wrong — try again.

proposals.title: Proposals
proposals.subtitle: Pick a recent quote and we'll build a client-ready proposal — company presentation + the quote — and prep the email.
proposals.coverTitlePlaceholder: e.g. The POS built for your restaurant
proposals.previewHint: The proposal preview will appear here once generated.
proposals.pagesHintThumb: Click the ✓ on a page in the preview to include/exclude it. {{count}} page(s) will be sent.
proposals.pagesHint: Pick which presentation pages to include. Click "Update preview" to refresh.
proposals.subject: Subject
proposals.smtpOff: Email isn't configured yet — contact an administrator.
proposals.noAcceptLink: Note: the online accept link couldn't be added (enable accept/decline in Zoho Books). The proposal was still sent.
proposals.sentSubtitle: Proposals you've sent, with live status from Zoho.
proposals.deleteConfirm: Remove the sent proposal for {{customer}} from the board? (The Zoho quote is not affected.)

kaizenDemo.title: Kaizen DEMO
kaizenDemo.subtitle: Run a live demo of the Kaizen POS, streamed in your browser.
kaizenDemo.readyTitle: Ready to demo the Kaizen POS
kaizenDemo.readyHint: Click below to start a live, interactive session. It opens in this page — give it a few seconds to load the first time.
kaizenDemo.safariHint: On Safari, the embedded view may stay black because of cross-site tracking protection. Use "Open in new tab" for the best experience (or try Chrome).
kaizenDemo.notConfigured: The demo isn't configured yet. An administrator needs to finish the AWS AppStream setup.
kaizenDemo.fleetStopped: The demo is available from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM (Montreal time). It's currently off to save costs — please try again during those hours (allow a few minutes after 7:00 AM for it to start).
kaizenDemo.error: Couldn't start the demo. Please try again in a moment.

sessions.title: Sessions & capacity
sessions.hintStopped: The fleet is stopped — no one can stream until it starts. An admin can start it in the AWS AppStream console (or wait for the scheduled start).
sessions.hintFull: All instances are in use — that's why "No streaming resources are available" appears. Wait for a session below to free up, or increase the fleet's capacity in AWS.

dataHealth.title: Needs attention
dataHealth.subtitle: Data that should be reviewed and fixed — unassigned records, missing roles and mappings.
dataHealth.error: Couldn't load the data-health summary. Please try again.
dataHealth.allClearHint: No unassigned records or missing mappings right now.

resellerActivations.title: Unassigned reseller activations
resellerActivations.desc: POS activations with no recognized reseller (no matching name, no email). Map them to a reseller in the Reseller section.

invoices.title: Unassigned invoices
invoices.desc: Invoices earning commission but with no salesperson. Fix the attribution in Zoho Books.

zentactMerchants.title: Zentact merchants with no rep
zentactMerchants.desc: Active Zentact merchants not assigned to a rep (and not reseller-boarded). Assign them in the Commission Tracker.

repsNoRole.title: Reps with no role
repsNoRole.desc: Active salespeople with no role — they see an empty menu when they log in. Assign a role in Users.

resellerEmails.title: Unmapped reseller emails
resellerEmails.desc: Reseller emails seen in activations but not linked to any managed reseller. Map them in Manage Resellers.

reports.title: User reports
reports.subtitle: Missing commission / points flagged by reps. Resolve once handled.

invoiceList.hint: Fix attribution in Zoho Books (a sync overwrites local edits).

savingsCalc.title: Savings calculator
savingsCalc.subtitle: Analyze a competitor's merchant statement and show the savings with Cluster.
savingsCalc.noTemplate: No pricing template is set up yet. Ask an administrator to create one.
savingsCalc.label: Label
savingsCalc.clusterHint: Cluster prices come from your pricing template. Enter the quantities for this merchant.
savingsCalc.fillToSee: Fill in the statement to see the savings.
savingsCalc.parsedTitle: Statement read — please verify the values below
savingsCalc.parseError: Couldn't read the statement. Enter the values manually.
savingsCalc.aiNotConfigured: AI parsing isn't configured. An administrator needs to set the API key.
savingsCalc.aiRefused: The AI declined to process this document. Enter the values manually.

savingsPricing.title: Savings pricing templates
savingsPricing.subtitle: Cluster rates + internal costs used by the savings calculator. Assign templates to reps.
savingsPricing.assignmentsHint: Pick which template each rep uses. "Use default" falls back to the default template.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Sales documents, guides and templates — search, browse and download.
resources.storageHint: Leave empty for no limit. Uploads are blocked beyond this.
resources.openError: Couldn't open the file — try again.
resources.fFiles: File(s) — select several to upload at once
resources.multiNote: {{count}} files — each becomes a resource named after its file; the category & tags below apply to all.
resources.catNote: Categories organize the library. Deleting one (admin) leaves its files uncategorized.
resources.catDeleteConfirm: Delete the category "{{name}}"? Files keep their label but it leaves the list.
resources.dropInvalid: No valid files to upload (each file must be under 25 MB).
resources.importQueued: Importing {{count}} file(s) in the background — they'll appear here in a moment (folders become categories; files over 25 MB are skipped).
resources.importError: Import failed — the ZIP may be too large (max 300 MB). Try splitting it.
resources.folderDeleteConfirm: Delete the folder "{{name}}" and its {{count}} file(s)? This cannot be undone.
resources.deleteAllNote: Permanently removes every file and category. Admin only.
resources.deleteAllConfirm: Permanently delete ALL {{count}} files and every category? This cannot be undone.

repDashboard.title: My Dashboard
repDashboard.subtitle: Your performance — {{month}}
repDashboard.beforeTax: Gross amount, before taxes and deductions.
repDashboard.pendingHint: Earned but not yet paid — unlocks when the customer pays.
repDashboard.zeroCommissionNote: No commission has unlocked yet this month. Commission unlocks when a sale is paid — your recent sales are in "Pending commission" below until then.
repDashboard.annualDisabledNote: The annual bonus is turned off for you.
repDashboard.topCustomersSub: Your unlocked commission by customer, year to date.

adminActions.allSent: All reps sent for this month

dashboard.title: Sales Hub
dashboard.subtitle: Revenue overview, invoices, and customer insights
dashboard.avgRevenuePerMerchantTip: Average monthly combined revenue (SaaS + payment processing) across the merchants we matched to a SaaS subscription in Merchant ↔ SaaS. Merchants active on payments but without a linked SaaS are excluded.

commissionTracker.title: Commission Tracker
commissionTracker.subtitle: {{month}} {{year}} · {{count}} SOLD deals

missing.title: Report missing points
missing.subtitle: Think points are missing or wrong? Send the details to an administrator.
missing.refPlaceholder: e.g. a merchant name or deal
missing.messagePlaceholder: Describe the deal/activation and the points you expected…
missing.sent: Sent — an administrator will review it.

commissionTracker.overrideSourceHint: Override this deal's lead source (kept across CRM syncs)
commissionTracker.dealsDoNotCount: Deals don't count toward this rep — team "{{team}}" tracks payment activations only.
commissionTracker.sourceOverridden: Source manually overridden (frozen) — Zoho value: {{source}}. Clear the override to follow Zoho again.
commissionTracker.restrictedDetails: Details restricted — only visible to admins or your own row

missing.title: Report a missing commission
missing.subtitle: Think a commission is missing or wrong? Send the details to an administrator.
missing.messagePlaceholder: Describe the account, invoice, or amount you expected…
missing.sent: Sent — an administrator will review it.

payStub.title: Pay Stub
payStub.quotaNotMet: Quota NOT met — this month's hardware/SaaS commissions are withheld
payStub.quotaWaived: Override active — this month is paid despite the missed quota
payStub.quotaWaiveStarted: Saved — recalculating commissions, reopen the pay stub in ~2 minutes.
payStub.noData: No commissions or bonuses for this rep in this period.
payStub.discrepancyHint: Paid = amount from the imported file. App calc. = the app's computed commission; ⚠ marks a difference.
payStub.generatedHint: Generated from the app's commission model: UNPAID commissions unlocked this period + signup payments.
payStub.committedToPayroll: ✓ {{count}} invoice(s) marked paid — added to {{month}} payroll. Go to Commissions → Payroll to send it.
payStub.uncommitConfirm: Undo the payment for {{rep}} — {{period}}? The period's commissions go back to UNPAID (pending).
payStub.uncommitDone: ✓ Payment undone — {{count}} invoice(s) back to pending.
payStub.missedTitle: Earned this period but NOT paid
payStub.missedHint: Unlocked per the app's model but not covered by any payment — verify whether these were forgotten. Not included in the total above.
payStub.adjustConfirm: Carry these missed commissions to the selected month? They'll be marked settled here and added to that month's pay stub.
payStub.reconstructedBanner: This import predates per-invoice storage, so the invoice breakdown below is reconstructed from the app's data. The file total stays authoritative. Re-import the file to store the exact paid amounts.

commissionReport.title: Commission Report
commissionReport.grossDisclaimer: Gross amounts — before income tax, deductions and source withholdings.
commissionReport.searchNoResults: No invoice matches your search for this year.

processing.title: My payment revenue (merchants)
processing.subtitle: Your payment merchants and the processing-bonus commission paid on each.

commissionReport.noPaidCommissions: No paid commissions for this period
commissionReport.pointsBonusesSubtitle: Monthly quota progress and annual bonus tier tracking
commissionReport.pendingHelp: Hardware sales waiting for first SaaS invoice, or paid invoices outside the 3-month window.
commissionReport.quotaForfeitedHint: {{amount}} in commissions were withheld this month because the quota wasn't met.

exclude.confirm: Refuse commission on {{invoice}}? It will become $0 (reversible).

commissionReport.noUnlockedCommissions: No unlocked commissions for this period

resources.title: Resources storage
resources.subtitle: Set the overall library cap, per-role defaults and per-user upload limits.
resources.globalSubtitle: Total space used by all files in the Resources library.
resources.limitHint: Leave empty for no limit. Uploads are blocked once the cap is reached.
resources.roleSubtitle: Default upload cap for everyone with a role. A per-user limit always overrides it.
resources.roleHint: Leave a role's limit empty for no role-level cap.
resources.perUserSubtitle: Every known user, auto-populated. Click the pencil to give someone a custom cap that overrides their role limit.
resources.perUserHint: Leave the field empty (or 0) to remove the custom cap and fall back to the role limit.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Manage your Zoho Books and Zentact connections

zohoSync.title: Zoho Books Sync
zohoSync.subtitle: Import and sync invoices from Zoho Books
zohoSync.fullImportRunning: Full import is running in the background. This may take 10-20 minutes. You can leave this page — the import will continue.

crm.title: Zoho CRM Connection
crm.subtitle: Connect your Zoho CRM account to track deals, points, and quota attainment.
crm.connectedDesc: Deals, points, and quota data will be pulled from Zoho CRM automatically.
crm.notConnectedDesc: Connect your Zoho CRM account to enable deal tracking, points calculation, and monthly quota monitoring per the compensation plan.

zentact.title: Zentact Payment Integration
zentact.subtitle: Sync merchant activations from Zentact — each active merchant earns 1 point + $100 bonus for the rep
zentact.noUnassigned: All active merchants are assigned to a rep.
zentact.csvHint: Upload a CSV file with columns: merchant, sales_rep, activated_at. Merchant names must match the business names in Zentact. Date format: YYYY-MM-DD or MM/DD/YYYY.

enrich.title: Invoice Enrichment
enrich.subtitle: Fetch line items from Zoho Books and classify each invoice as hardware or SaaS (with subscription activation dates). Required before commissions can be calculated.
enrich.note: Makes ~2 Zoho calls per un-enriched invoice — this can take a while for large imports and may pause on Zoho API limits (it resumes where it left off).
enrich.confirm:
Enrich all invoices that are missing line-item classification?

This fetches details from Zoho Books (~2 calls per invoice) and runs in the background. It may take a while for large imports.

resellers.title: Resellers
resellers.subtitle: Map reseller emails to their exact name, set their Zentact key, and assign data from each system.
resellers.name: Name
resellers.aliasesHint: Other names this reseller is sent as in the Zoho form / Zentact (comma-separated). Rolls those activations up under this reseller.
resellers.confirmDelete: Delete reseller "{{name}}"? Its email mappings will be removed (activations stay).
resellers.unassignedHint: These emails appear in POS activations but aren't mapped to any reseller. Assign each to a reseller.
resellers.logoHint: PNG or JPG, max 2 MB. Shown in the reseller portal.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose who receives each automated email notification.
notifications.noRecipients: No recipients yet — nobody will be notified.
notifications.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
notifications.probationHint: These people are emailed 45, 30 and 15 days before a rep's 3-month probation ends.
notifications.reportsHint: These people are emailed when a rep reports a missing commission or missing points. If empty, no email is sent — reports appear in the "Needs attention" dashboard only.
notifications.newUserHint: These people are emailed when someone signs in to Sales Hub for the first time without any role — their menu stays empty until a role is assigned. If empty, nobody is notified.
notifications.moreSoon: More notification types will appear here as they are added.

deals.title: Deals
deals.subtitle: Move a deal (and its points) to a different month — e.g. a deal submitted last month but only just synced from Zoho.
deals.searchPlaceholder: Search by deal name, account, or rep…
deals.moveToPrevMonth: Set the date to the same day, one month earlier

merchantLinks.title: Merchant ↔ SaaS links
merchantLinks.subtitle: Match each payment merchant to its Zoho Billing customer so combined revenue per merchant is accurate. Auto-matched by name; curate the rest.
merchantLinks.searchCustomer: Search a Billing customer by name…
merchantLinks.linkHint: Pick the Zoho Billing customer that is this merchant.

emailPreview.title: Email preview & test
emailPreview.subtitle: Preview every transactional email with sample data and send yourself a test copy.

recalculate.title: Commission Recalculation
recalculate.subtitle: Apply the commission model to every invoice (SaaS first month 100%, renewals 0%, hardware 10% within 3 months of first SaaS). Uses already-enriched data — run Enrich first.
recalculate.waitForEnrich: Waiting for enrichment to finish — recalculation will use the classified data once Enrich completes.
recalculate.fetchNote: First run fetches from Zoho and caches locally. Subsequent runs will be near-instant.
recalculate.paidOnlyNote: Only paid invoices are recalculated — unpaid, void, and draft invoices are skipped.
recalculate.confirmRecalculate:
Recalculate commissions for ALL invoices using the current model?

• SaaS first month → 100%
• SaaS renewals → 0%
• Hardware → 10% within 3 months of first SaaS

Runs in the background. Make sure Enrich has finished first so invoices are classified.

bonusTiers.title: Bonus tiers
bonusTiers.subtitle: Points thresholds that unlock each bonus. Highest reached tier wins (not cumulative).

dealPoints.title: Points by deal type
dealPoints.subtitle: Set how many points a deal is worth based on its lead source. Types left unset keep their synced CRM points.
dealPoints.empty: No custom point values yet. Add one below.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Group salespeople for quota tracking. Teams flagged as not counting are tracked but excluded from team & company quota.
teams.empty: No teams yet. Create one above, then assign salespeople below.
teams.includeDealsHint: Include CRM deal points in this team's quota
teams.includePaymentsHint: Include payment-activation points in this team's quota
teams.quotaHint: Leave blank for automatic target (15 × members). Enter a number to set a fixed team quota.
teams.countsHint: When off, this team's reps are tracked but excluded from team & company quota totals.
teams.confirmDelete: Delete team "{{name}}"? Its members will become unassigned.

salespeople.title: Manage Salespeople
salespeople.subtitle: Toggle salespeople on/off to control who appears in invoice filters and commission reports
salespeople.addPlaceholder: New salesperson name (exactly as in Zoho)
salespeople.probationRecipientsHint: Emails notified 45, 30 and 15 days before a rep's 3-month probation ends (comma-separated).
salespeople.emailHint: The rep's Zoho login email — enables role pre-assignment and impersonation before their first login.
salespeople.hireDateHint: Drives the 90-day ramp: quota gating is waived during the first 90 days (comp plan §7).
salespeople.quotaGateHint: Comp plan §2: months below quota pay no hardware/SaaS commissions. Turn OFF to exempt this person (house accounts, execs…).
salespeople.processingBonusHint: Bi-annual processing/volume bonus. Turn OFF to exclude this (active) person from that bonus, without affecting their commissions.
salespeople.annualBonusHint: Year-end annual points bonus. Turn OFF to exclude this person from it.
salespeople.quotaHint: Leave blank to use the default (15 pts). Set a number for this rep's own monthly quota.
salespeople.signupToggleHint: Toggle the signup payment on/off for this salesperson
salespeople.aliasesHint: Other names this rep is known by (e.g. Gaby, Liz). Comma-separated.

customers.title: Top Customers — Exclusions
customers.subtitle: Exclude customers from appearing in the dashboard Top Customers list

releases.title: Release Management
releases.newTagsLabel: Mark as new in the menu
releases.newTagsHint: Pick menu items to highlight with a 'New' dot + badge + on-page banner for this release.
releases.workflowTriggered: Release workflow triggered! GitHub Actions is building
releases.releaseFailed: ✕ Release workflow failed. Check GitHub Actions for details.

impersonate.title: Impersonate a User
impersonate.subtitle: Test the app as if you were a specific salesperson (for debugging permissions and visibility).
impersonate.hint: While impersonating, you'll see the app exactly as that salesperson does (no admin tools, restricted detail views). A yellow banner stays at the top until you stop.

externalUsers.title: External users (email + 2FA)
externalUsers.subtitle: Invite people outside the company. They log in with email, password and a mandatory authenticator code. Assign their permissions by email in the Roles tab.
externalUsers.smtpWarning: Email sending is not configured (SMTP_HOST / SMTP_USER / SMTP_PASS / SMTP_FROM on Heroku). Invitations will generate a link you can copy and send manually.
externalUsers.name: Name
externalUsers.inviteNotSent: Invitation created — email not sent (SMTP not configured). Copy the link below and send it yourself:
externalUsers.testSent: Test email sent to {{email}} — check your inbox.
externalUsers.empty: No external users yet — send a first invitation above.
externalUsers.confirmDelete: Delete {{email}}? They will no longer be able to log in.
externalUsers.rolesHint: 💡 Permissions: assign one or more roles to the user's email in Admin → Roles. Without a role, they can log in but see nothing.

commissionImport.title: Commissions
commissionImport.subtitle: Import pay files, review coverage, generate and send pay stubs, and manage bonuses.
commissionImport.uploadSubtitle: One .xlsx per rep per month. The file is parsed and previewed before any changes are applied.
commissionImport.dropPrompt: Click or drop an .xlsx file here
commissionImport.dropMultiple: Click or drop one or more .xlsx files here
commissionImport.volumeNoMatchHint: Unmatched accounts won't be excluded from the automated payout — fix the merchant name to avoid double-paying.
commissionImport.notFoundDetails: {{count}} invoices not found in our database
commissionImport.historySubtitle: Past commission report imports. Click a row to view its pay stub.

manualBonus.title: Manual bonus
manualBonus.subtitle: Add a one-off bonus to a rep's pay stub for a specific month, with your own description.
manualBonus.needRepAmount: Pick a rep and enter an amount.

adjustments.title: Commission adjustments
adjustments.subtitle: Carry an unpaid/missed commission from a past month forward to a target pay month (e.g. pay a March invoice in May's payroll). The source invoice is marked settled and the amount is added to the target month's pay stub.
adjustments.noUnpaid: No unpaid commissions for this rep.
adjustments.needSelection: Pick a rep and check at least one invoice.
adjustments.deleteConfirm: Undo this adjustment? The source invoice becomes unpaid again (reappears in the radar).
adjustments.freeHint: Add a positive or NEGATIVE amount to the selected rep's target month — e.g. deduct an overpayment from a past period. Shows as an "Adjustment" line on the pay stub and in payroll.
adjustments.freeNeedAmount: Pick a rep and enter a non-zero amount.
adjustments.freeDescRequired: Description required — it is the reason the rep sees on their pay stub.
adjustments.sugSubtitle: Anomalies detected by reconciliation. Apply creates the adjustment on the CURRENT month's pay stub; Ignore hides the suggestion permanently.
adjustments.sugApplyConfirm: Apply this adjustment? {{rep}} — {{amount}} ({{reason}}), on the {{month}} pay stub.

sugTypeHint.over_activation: A first-month SaaS activation commission was paid even though the customer already existed — overpayment to deduct.
sugTypeHint.over_void: The commission was paid but the invoice has since been voided/deleted in Zoho — overpayment to deduct.
sugTypeHint.double_paid: The same invoice appears in more than one pay file or commit — the excess should be deducted.
sugTypeHint.never_paid: Commission unlocked in a closed month but never paid out — carry it to the current month.

viewHint.suggestions: Anomalies detected by reconciliation — apply or ignore each proposal.
viewHint.create: Carry unpaid commissions to a pay month, or add a free (±) amount.

modeHint.carry: Check unpaid commissions below — they move to the target month and get paid with it.
modeHint.free: Positive or negative amount (e.g. -118.00 for an overpayment) added to the target month's stub.

sugDetail.totalPaid: Total paid: {{total}} — everything but the largest payment gets deducted.

adjustments.sugEmptyHint: Reconciliation found nothing to correct. New anomalies will show up here.

quotaReview.title: Missed-quota review
quotaReview.subtitle: Invoices whose commission was zeroed because the rep missed that month's quota. Pick "Pay anyway" or "Confirm forfeit" for each case.
quotaReview.emptyHint: No commission is currently withheld for a missed quota.
quotaReview.emptyHistoryHint: No decision has been confirmed yet.
quotaReview.payAnywayConfirm: Pay {{rep}} anyway for {{month}} despite the missed quota? A recalc will unlock their commissions for that month.
quotaReview.payAnywayStarted: Payment authorized — recalculating now, commissions will reappear shortly.

reconciliation.title: Annual reconciliation
reconciliation.subtitle: Paid (pay ledger) vs calculated (commission model) vs delta — per rep and per month, to balance the books at year end.
reconciliation.empty: No payments or calculated commissions for this year.
reconciliation.platformNote: Months before May 2026 were paid from the imported reports (the old system) — their deltas vs the current model are expected and need no correction. The platform pays from May 2026.
reconciliation.legend: ✓ = balanced (delta < $1) · red = overpaid vs the model · amber = underpaid vs the model. Click a rep for the monthly detail.

payroll.title: Send to Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Compile a month's commissions for all active reps and email it to payroll (summary table + one combined PDF of every pay stub).
payroll.recipientsSubtitle: The emails that receive the summary + PDF. Add as many as needed.
payroll.confirmSend: Send {{count}} rep(s)' commissions to payroll by email?
payroll.none: Nothing to send for this period.
payroll.noRecipients: Add at least one recipient first.
payroll.historySubtitle: Every payroll send, most recent first. Click a row to see the reps included.
payroll.historyNone: No payroll has been sent yet.
payroll.histDeleteConfirm: Delete the {{month}} {{year}} send from the history? This only removes the history record — it does not un-send the email.

processing.title: Processing Bonus (bi-annual)
processing.subtitle: Paid ONCE per account, at the June or December payout after its first 6 months are complete. The 6-month window is anchored to the account's activation. Per account: avg monthly (transaction profit + other revenue) over its active months, minus the first $100, capped at $400 (needs revenue in ≥3 of the 6 months). Active reps only.
processing.none: No qualifying accounts for this period.
processing.commitConfirm: Record this {{total}} bi-annual payout as paid? The accounts will be excluded from future computations (paid once).
processing.committedInfo: {{count}} account(s) already committed for this period ({{total}}).
processing.uncommitConfirm: Undo the committed payout for this period? These accounts become eligible again.

reportYears.title: Report Years
reportYears.subtitle: Hide a past year from the Commission Report and the coverage matrix below (e.g. 2025, pre-platform data that causes confusion). Nothing is deleted — a hidden year can be shown again anytime.

coverage.title: Coverage & Reconciliation
coverage.subtitle: One cell per rep per month since Jan 2025. Spot missing pay files and unpaid commissions at a glance — click a cell to open that month's pay stub.

payStub.title: Pay Stub
payStub.discrepancyHint: Paid = amount from the imported file. App calc. = the app's computed commission; ⚠ marks a difference.

roles.title: Roles & Permissions
roles.subtitle: Create custom roles and assign granular permissions to control what each user can see and do.
roles.cloneHint: Create a new role with the same permissions
roles.noRoles: No roles defined yet — click 'New Role' to get started.
roles.descManager: Team manager — full team visibility, can approve commissions
roles.descSalesRep: Standard salesperson — sees own data only

usersSection.title: User Management
usersSection.subtitle: Roles, admin access, role pre-assignment and external users

admins.title: User Access
admins.subtitle: Manage roles and admin access for everyone who can sign in
admins.description: Zoho users, external users and pre-assigned emails all appear here. Assign roles to control what each user sees, and grant or revoke admin privileges (Zoho accounts only). Admins can access all data, manage salespeople, run syncs, and modify settings.
admins.demoHint: Demo mode: this account sees the whole app with scrambled data (fake client names, scaled amounts) and cannot modify anything.
admins.confirmDemo: Put {{email}} in demo mode? They will see fake client names and scaled amounts, read-only.
admins.confirmDelete: Delete user {{email}}? This removes their access, roles and preferences. (A Zoho user can log back in.)
admins.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account.
admins.preassignHint: Works before their first login — roles apply by email match.
admins.rolesVsAdminHint: For full access, use the Admin toggle instead — it grants everything (all menus + the Admin Panel). Roles are for non-admin users (e.g. Management, Sales Rep).
admins.managedTeamsHint: This manager will see only the selected team(s) on their dashboard and in the tracker.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences

requestFeature.sent: Thanks — your suggestion was sent to the team.
